About.title: About One Academy
About.subtitle: Modern & Integrated LMS Platform
About.description: One Academy is a modular, modern, and integrated Learning Management System (LMS) platform designed for all education levels (Elementary, Junior High, Senior High, and Universities).

CTA.title: Ready to Start Learning More Effectively?
CTA.description: Join One Academy today and elevate your academic achievements through the best digital learning platform.

Chatbot.welcome:
Hello! I am **One Academy AI Assistant**. Ready to help you navigate courses, assignments, attendance, and grades on the One Academy portal:

- Access modular course materials
- Check assignments & announcements
- How to perform class attendance
- Navigate the student portal

Is there anything I can help you with?
Chatbot.title: One Academy AI
Chatbot.warning: AI can make mistakes. Verify important information directly with our team.
Chatbot.errorBusy: Sorry, the AI is busy. Please try again in a moment.
Chatbot.errorGeneric: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
Chatbot.question1: How do I access course modules?
Chatbot.question2: How do I log my class attendance?
Chatbot.question3: Where can I check my assignment grades?

Events.title: Upcoming Classes & Sessions
Events.subtitle: Stay informed about our interactive virtual classes and mentoring sessions, tailored to help you excel.
Events.event1_desc: Learn the basics of computational thinking and basic programming using Python.
Events.event2_desc: Understand user interface layouts, color theory, and creating interactive presentation slides.
Events.event3_desc: Exclusive mentoring session with our teachers to prepare for end-of-semester exams.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our LMS SaaS, student portal, and modular classes.
FAQ.a1: One Academy is a modular, modern, and integrated Learning Management System (LMS) designed to support digital education across all levels (Elementary, Junior High, Senior High, and Higher Education).
FAQ.q2: Who can access the One Academy portal?
FAQ.a2: The portal is designed for students and teachers. Students can access study materials, submit assignments, log attendance, and view grades, while teachers can manage modules and grades.
FAQ.q3: What is the student registration process?
FAQ.a3: Registration is conducted online via our enrollment form. Once approved by the school/university administrator, your account is activated and you can access the student portal.
FAQ.q4: Are there structured study materials in the LMS?
FAQ.a4: Yes! One Academy provides structured modular learning content tailored specifically to the student's active level of education (SD, SMP, SMA, or University).
FAQ.q5: Does the platform feature an AI assistant?
FAQ.a5: Yes! One Academy features the One Academy AI Assistant, designed to guide students through course modules, answer FAQs, and assist in navigating the platform.

Footer.description: A modular, modern, and integrated Learning Management System (LMS) platform designed for all education levels (Elementary, Junior High, Senior High, and Universities).

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data
Privacy.sec1Content: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when registering as a student, such as your full name, email address, education level, school/major, WhatsApp number, and learning progress.
Privacy.sec2Content: The information we collect is used for student onboarding, academic administration, tracking class attendance, providing modular LMS access, and sending academic notifications.
Privacy.sec3Content: We are committed to maintaining the security of your personal data. We implement technical and organizational measures designed to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
Privacy.sec4Content: Our platform uses cookies to store your login session preferences and language preferences to enhance user experience.
Privacy.sec5Content: You have the right to access, update, or request the deletion of your personal information from our system. Please contact the school administrators if you wish to make such a request.
Privacy.sec6Content: For questions or feedback regarding this privacy policy, you can contact us through the official communication channels of One Academy.

Projects.title: LMS Core Features
Projects.subtitle: One Academy provides a comprehensive digital learning ecosystem for students, teachers, and admins.
Projects.project1_desc: Manage learning materials, interactive videos, and PDF summaries customized for each education level.
Projects.project2_desc: An installable progressive web app so students can access the portal and study anytime, anywhere.
Projects.project3_desc: One-click digital check-in to track student attendance and engagement in real-time.
Projects.project4_desc: An assistant powered by artificial intelligence (Gemini AI) that guides students through courses & tasks 24/7.
Projects.project5_desc: Boost student enthusiasm using points for attendance and course completions, with interactive rankings.
Projects.project6_desc: Automated summaries of grades, attendance, and quiz performance for easy teacher/school reporting.

Articles.title: Educational Articles & Insights

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.subtitle: Rules and guidelines for using the One Academy platform
Terms.sec1Content: By accessing and using the One Academy platform, you are deemed to have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you are not permitted to use this platform.
Terms.sec2Content: Student account registration is conducted for academic purposes. Each user is fully responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account information and password. Users must provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information during registration.
Terms.sec3Content: All content, logos, brands, code, educational materials, and designs on this platform are the property of One Academy or our contributors, and are protected by copyright laws. Use of content without written permission from One Academy developers is strictly prohibited.
Terms.sec4Content: All students and users must maintain communication ethics, respect differences, and avoid actions that disrupt the learning environment. Plagiarism, academic cheating, and dissemination of negative content will be penalized.
Terms.sec5Content: This platform is provided 'as is'. One Academy is not responsible for temporary technical disruptions or service unavailabilities beyond our control.
Terms.sec6Content: If you have any questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us via our official email.

WhyPartner.subtitle: Discover the benefits of collaborating with our modern learning platform

WhyPartner.reason2_desc: Features modern tech stacks, real-time attendance logging, and supportive AI tutor assistance.
WhyPartner.reason3_desc: Easily customized for schools, universities, study centers, and corporate training.

AboutPage.title: Digitizing Education Through Technology
AboutPage.subtitle: ABOUT ONE ACADEMY
AboutPage.description: One Academy is a modular, modern, and integrated Learning Management System (LMS) platform designed to support digital transformation in classrooms.
AboutPage.vision_text: To be a leading educational solution platform facilitating modular, efficient, and engaging digital learning.
AboutPage.m1: Providing high-quality modular study content customizable for SD, SMP, SMA, and Universities.
AboutPage.m2: Creating an interactive, student-friendly portal integrated with artificial intelligence.
AboutPage.m3: Assisting educational institutions in managing attendance, assignments, and grades transparently.
AboutPage.m4: Connecting students with the best study resources and supportive AI tutor assistants.
AboutPage.divisions_subtitle: One Academy is designed to adapt to various stages of education.
AboutPage.div1_desc: Interactive lessons focused on fundamental concepts, engaging visuals, and basic scientific principles.
AboutPage.div2_desc: Structured courses focused on expanding fundamental theories and interactive assignments.
AboutPage.div3_desc: Exam prep modules, specialized study paths (Sciences/Humanities), and university entrance materials.
AboutPage.div4_desc: Advanced university lecture materials, independent research modules, and project portfolios.
AboutPage.milestones_subtitle: How we built and evolved our LMS platform from year to year.
AboutPage.ms1_desc: Started research on digital education needs and designed the modular LMS database schemas.
AboutPage.ms2_desc: Conducted a limited trial run of the platform, integrating attendance logging and online course modules.
AboutPage.ms3_desc: Officially launched One Academy as a SaaS LMS platform catering to SD, SMP, SMA, and Universities.

Pricing.title: Modular Learning Plans
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the modular learning package that fits your education level and experience seamless digital learning.
Pricing.sdDesc: Introduction to basic learning concepts with interactive visuals and engaging materials.
Pricing.smpDesc: In-depth study of basic theories and structured interactive quizzes to prepare for high school.
Pricing.smaDesc: Exam prep, college entrance preparation, and intensive learning path mentoring.
Pricing.univDesc: Development of real-world project portfolios, collaborative research, and professional career readiness.
